[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 011001111 6
1 010111010 5
2 011101101 6
3 101100010 4
4 010101110 5
5 000001000 1
6 101111110 7
7 000100001 2

01 010001101 4
12 101000000 2
23 000001010 2
34 011100001 4
45 000010000 1
56 000000000 a
67 001000101 3
70 000010010 2

02 001000001 2
13 100000010 2
24 010100010 3
35 001100000 2
46 000010000 1
57 000000101 2
60 000000010 1
71 010011000 3

03 000001000 1 match 5
14 101100010 4 match 3
25 000100000 1
36 000100000 1
47 000000100 1
50 000000010 1
61 010001101 4
72 000010000 1

04 011100001 4
15 101100000 3
26 000100000 1
37 001000101 3
40 000010000 1
51 010001101 4
62 001000001 2
73 000011010 3

05 001100000 2
16 100100000 2
27 000000100 1
30 000000000 a
41 000011100 3
52 000000001 1
63 000001010 2

75 000110000 2
